title: Restore coverage target after governance checker additions

sources.reason: Focused regression tests for the complexity checker.

riskAssessment.reason: Adding focused tests is low behavior risk; the key risk is leaving latest-main coverage below the agreed target.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized the established remediation loop; focused tests are within scope.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Focused complexity-checker tests raise latest-main total coverage to at least 85%.
Tests cover policy parsing, line counting, and archive-index validation branches without changing production behavior.
All required AI Cockpit and project quality gates pass, and the Work Item is archived before PR creation.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The latest main branch is below the agreed 85% total coverage target because the complexity checker added production statements after the prior coverage PR.
constraints: Add focused tests only; do not weaken coverage thresholds or modify production checker behavior.
Preserve existing archive and complexity policy semantics.
intent.rationale: Covering the new checker paths restores the target without changing the governance behavior that the complexity PR introduced.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
